Very delicious, juicy sweet-tart apples! Beware of the poison ivy. Several trees around here. Falling Fruit season: July-October.

Many black walnut trees within the few blocks around Chardon square. Most located in people's yards, ask before picking. Noticed most to the west of the square though also some to the east. Not sure of north and south. Location approximate.
Along the trail east of the campgrounds. Pawpaw patch is large and near the creek but mostly unproductive, good for ID practice. Lots of spicebush along this path and others. In Metroparks.

Along west side of trail just across drainage area / small trickle of water. Single tree, not many fruits, partly shaded.

Location approximate. On east side of road. Tree isn't taken care of so tends to produce small fruits. Not a crabapple. Access: Private.
